description: Composition Green, white and red printed kurta, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short front opening with buttons, three quarter length sleeves with red edging, side bust darts, red printed panel at front and side vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately as colour may bleed Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This kurta from aurelia has a fresh, detailed print in green which is nicely complemented by red accents. Three quarter sleeves make this perfect for covering your arms while still keeping cool on a sunny day so just pop it on over jeans for an easy, comfortable look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 35”
